roofingBrief.diagnosis: Northside Roofing already has a website, but it likely undersells the real business. The redesign opportunity is to improve clarity, trust, and the path from interest to booking or enquiry. Make the current site feel more credible than the existing version. Clarify the next step so mobile visitors can act faster. The biggest revenue leak is usually weak quote intent and unclear trust on mobile.
roofingBrief.siteBrief: Northside Roofing is a roofing contractor. Lead with Northside Roofing already has real-world traction; the website should finally feel as strong as the service. Highlight roof replacement, storm repair. Keep the tone confident, practical, conversion-focused. The main CTA should be Request a quote. One design choice that should stand out is high-contrast CTA.
roofingBrief.coldMessage: Hey Northside, I looked at Northside Roofing. Current site feels dated and mobile CTA is weak I took a look at the current site and mocked up a version that makes the offer clearer and the next step easier for mobile visitors. Happy to send the mockup if you want to see it.
followUps: Quick follow-up: the clearest gap I noticed is hero clarity. I can send over the mockup if it would help.
One more thought: nearby competitors usually do a better job showing CTA path. I already mocked up a tighter version if you want to compare it.
subjectLines: Saw your listing and made this for Northside Roofing
proofPoints: Service-area and quote path can be made clearer on mobile

salonBrief.diagnosis: Soft Signal Salon appears to have no meaningful website presence, which means search and referral traffic has nowhere strong to land. A simple, credible salon site would likely improve trust and enquiry conversion. Let visual proof and booking flow do more of the selling. The biggest leak is usually unclear positioning and a weak next step.
salonBrief.siteBrief: Soft Signal Salon is a salon. Lead with colour presented around one clear local advantage: Only a thin profile and social snippets are available so far Highlight colour, cut. Keep the tone warm, aspirational, human. The main CTA should be Message on instagram. One design choice that should stand out is visual first impression.
salonBrief.coldMessage: Hey Soft, I looked at Soft Signal Salon. Only a thin profile and social snippets are available so far. Noticed there is no dedicated website experience for your salon in your area, so I mocked up what a clearer first impression could look like. Happy to send the mockup if you want to see it.
followUps: Quick follow-up: the clearest gap I noticed is gallery quality. I can send over the mockup if it would help.
One more thought: nearby competitors usually do a better job showing booking CTA. I already mocked up a tighter version if you want to compare it.
subjectLines: Built something for Soft Signal Salon
Quick mockup for Soft Signal Salon
